title: Day 1: Introduction
scripture_text: And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.
reflection: In this chapter, Shawn shares about what it means to have nothing and still find everything in God's provision. Sometimes life throws us into situations we never asked for. But God is in the details — even the ones that hurt.
prayer: Lord, thank You for Shawn's testimony about poverty. Help me to see Your hand in my own poverty. Give me eyes to see the miracles I've been running from. In Jesus' name, Amen.
action_step: If you're in a season of lack, write down three things you DO have. Gratitude shifts perspective.
podcast_topic: Episode idea: "Introduction" — what it means to have nothing and still find everything in God's provision. Raw conversation about how this chapter of Shawn's life connects to what listeners are going through today.
social_media_post: "Introduction" — Philippians 4:19: "And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Chri..." What miracle are you running from today? #RunningFromMiracles #ValueToVictory #Faith

title: Day 2: Looking for God
scripture_text: Train up a child in the way he should go: and when he is old, he will not depart from it.
reflection: Today's reading reminds us that the complicated, beautiful, painful reality of family — and how God works through it all. Shawn's story proves that what looks like destruction is often preparation.
prayer: Lord, thank You for Shawn's testimony about family. Help me to see Your hand in my own family. Give me eyes to see the miracles I've been running from. In Jesus' name, Amen.
action_step: Reach out to one family member today — even if the relationship is complicated. A text is enough.
podcast_topic: Episode idea: "Looking for God" — the complicated, beautiful, painful reality of family — and how God works through it all. Raw conversation about how this chapter of Shawn's life connects to what listeners are going through today.

social_media_post: "More Traditional Salvation Prayer" — Joshua 24:15: "As for me and my house, we will serve the LORD...." What miracle are you running from today? #RunningFromMiracles #ValueToVictory #Faith
